mapper.select: SELECT car.*, employee.name AS employee_name FROM car LEFT JOIN employee ON car.employee_id = employee.employee_id WHERE car.car_id = #{carId}
SELECT car.*, employee.name AS employee_name FROM car LEFT JOIN employee ON car.employee_id = employee.employee_id
SELECT car.*, employee.name AS employee_name FROM car LEFT JOIN employee ON car.employee_id = employee.employee_id WHERE car.in_use = TRUE
SELECT car.*, employee.name AS employee_name FROM car LEFT JOIN employee ON car.employee_id = employee.employee_id WHERE car.to_service = TRUE
SELECT car.*, employee.name AS employee_name FROM car LEFT JOIN employee ON car.employee_id = employee.employee_id WHERE car.to_renew_insurance = TRUE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO car (car_year, milage, last_serviced, to_service, need_to_service_date, last_insurance_renewal, insurance_expire_date, to_renew_insurance, in_use, employee_id, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{carYear}, #{milage}, #{lastServiced}, #{toService}, #{needToServiceDate}, #{lastInsuranceRenewal}, #{insuranceExpireDate}, #{toRenewInsurance}, #{inUse}, #{employeeId}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE car SET car_year = #{carYear}, milage = #{milage}, last_serviced = #{lastServiced}, to_service = #{toService}, need_to_service_date = #{needToServiceDate}, last_insurance_renewal = #{lastInsuranceRenewal}, insurance_expire_date = #{insuranceExpireDate}, to_renew_insurance = #{toRenewInsurance}, in_use = #{inUse}, employee_id = #{employeeId}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE car_id = #{carId}
